title: Human needs
summary: 9609 AS — physical, social, and self-actualisation needs at work.
learningObjectives: Apply needs analysis to case studies.

simpleExplanation.title: What workers need
simpleExplanation.summary: Employees have basic physical needs plus social and esteem needs that employers can support or neglect.

sections.content: **Human needs** (2.2.2) underpin **Maslow** and **Herzberg** in 2.2.3. Use **case evidence** for unmet needs.
